title: Ka Kha Ading Hoih Bel HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gunpi taanglo bang nuam na'ng nong hilhna in
Dahna tui bangin hong leet hi;
Topa hong
hilhna pha hi ka kha ading
Hoih bel hi kha ading, hoih bel hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hoih bel hi, hoih
bel hi, kha ading
Hoih bel hi, hoih bel hi, Kha ading

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Dawi in hong khem a bawlsiatna
hong tun hang,
Ka up ding a thuciam om hi;
Topa Jesuh in ka thaneem hong en hi,
Hoih bel hi,
kha ading, hoih bel hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong it a, anuam i ngaihsut ciang in-ah,
Ka mawh ka khialhna
sung panin;
Ka suahtakna ding singlamteh tung si hi,
Ka lungsim in ka phat hi
Topa.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa Jesuh tunung ciang hong pai ding hi,
Ka lungkhamna teng bei ding
hi;
Topa hih leitung ah hong pai ding in-ah;
Ka Kha Siangtho ading apha hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Topa
aw nong pai ding hun kong ngak uh hi,
Han hi lo, van hi, ko tupna;
Topa’ aw le van mite
pengkul aw hi,
Ka lam-etna le ka tawl damna.
